page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance belonging to the ecs.g7 family, powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 128 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 512.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention from other tenants.

Given its balanced resource distribution, the ecs.g7.32xlarge is designed for enterprise-grade workloads requiring high core counts and substantial memory. It is suited for large-scale web serving, enterprise applications, containerized microservices, and distributed database nodes that rely on network-attached storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance from the ecs.g7 family, utilizing the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 128 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.7 GHz, paired with 512.0 GB of RAM. This configuration provides a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance lacks local storage and GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage options. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps to handle high-throughput network traffic. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable performance for multi-threaded enterprise applications. The absence of local storage and GPUs makes it a cost-efficient choice for compute-heavy and memory-balanced workloads that do not require specialized hardware accelerators.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for enterprise workloads and database deployments.

tagline: A high-capacity, general-purpose virtual server offering dedicated Intel Xeon processing power and high-speed network connectivity for enterprise applications.
